steps.title: Read sign and intercept
steps.content: The graph has a positive $y$-intercept of $1.5$ and a negative slope. Since $R$ is positive, use those two facts to eliminate choices quickly.

steps.title: Check the choices with R positive
steps.content: Set $R=1$ in Desmos and graph the four forms. Choice A has negative slope and positive $y$-intercept; the others have the wrong slope sign, wrong intercept sign, or both.

steps.title: Confirm algebraically
steps.content: Choice A gives $Rx+12y=18$, so $y=-\frac{R}{12}x+\frac{18}{12}=-\frac{R}{12}x+1.5$. With $R>0$, this has negative slope and $y$-intercept $1.5$, matching the graph. Choice A is correct.
